title: Pteroceras fasciculatum
taxonomy: Pteroceras fasciculatum belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is a type of orchid, and more specifically, it is a genus within the subfamily Vanilloideae. Pteroceras fasciculatum is a genus of orchids that is native to tropical and subtropical regions. It is a type of epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants or objects for support. The exact classification of Pteroceras fasciculatum within the Orchidaceae family is as a genus of the subfamily Vanilloideae.
